goal: Add interactive help overlay (H key) — categorized, scrollable keybinding reference panel

changes.summary: Added help_mode global state with scroll position. Implemented render_help_overlay() with 8 categorized sections (Core, View & Navigation, Simulation & Modes, Analysis: Information, Analysis: Statistical, Analysis: Meta & Tools, Analysis: Ctrl Overlays, I/O & Mouse) covering all 100+ keybindings. H key toggles overlay (h still toggles heatmap). Arrow keys scroll when help is active, Page Up/Down for fast scroll. Added KEY_PGUP/KEY_PGDN to input handler. Status bar shows HELP indicator when active. Panel styled with dark blue-black background, box-drawing borders, gold key names, cyan category headers, matching existing panel aesthetic. Added [H]help to hint line.
